AND (expire_time IS NULL OR expire_time > ?)) ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1000 ==> Parameters: 0(Integer), 2026-04-26T12:16:24.918976200(LocalDateTime) <== Total: 0 Closing non transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@389b2c60] 2026-04-26T12:16:24.924+08:00 INFO 28108 --- [shortlink-backend] [ main] c.s.service.impl.LinkServiceImpl : 短链接缓存预热完成，预热数量: 0 2026-04-26T12:16:24.924+08:00 INFO 28108 --- [shortlink-backend] [ main] com.shortlink.config.CacheWarmUpRunner : 缓存预热执行完成 2026-04-26T12:16:24.925+08:00 INFO 28108 --- [shortlink-backend] [ main] c.s.config.BloomFilterInitializer : 开始初始化布隆过滤器... 2026-04-26T12:16:24.925+08:00 INFO 28108 --- [shortlink-backend] [ main] c.s.config.BloomFilterInitializer : 初始化用户名布隆过滤器...
